Index

Modules: asyncprocmonitor, ls, lstransports, nimcheck, nimexpand, nimlangserver, protocol/enums, protocol/types, routes/lsp, routes/mcp, suggestapi, testrunner, utils.

API symbols

`%*`:
  • ls: macro `%*`(t: untyped; inputStream: untyped): untyped
`mod`:
  • suggestapi: proc `mod`(nimsuggest: NimSuggest; file: string; dirtyfile = ""): Future[seq[Suggest]]
`type`:
  • suggestapi: proc `type`(self: NimSuggest; file: string; dirtyfile = ""; line: int; col: int; tag = ""): Future[seq[Suggest]]
addCallback:
  • utils: proc addCallback[T](future: Future[T]; cb: proc (future: Future[T]) {.closure, gcsafe.})
  • utils: proc addCallback(future: FutureBase; cb: proc () {.closure, gcsafe, raises: [].})
